title: Source
description: A research source with stable identity. source_id = sha256(canonical_locator)[:16].

source_id.description: sha256(canonical_locator)[:16] — stable across edits and continuation

canonical_locator.description: Canonical identifier: doi:10.1038/..., arxiv:2305.14251, or normalized URL (scheme+host+path, no fragment/tracking params)

raw_url.description: Original URL as retrieved, before normalization

metadata_status.description: How far metadata has been verified

registered_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when source was registered
